```typescript
// src/auto-iteration.ts
export class AutoIterationEngine {
  async runPhase(phase: string, agent: BaseAgent) {
    // 推送 Agent 状态变化
    this.realtimeService.broadcastAgentStatus({
      name: agent.name,
      status: 'running',
      currentTask: `${phase} 进行中...`
    })
    
    const result = await agent.execute(this.requirement)
    
    // 推送完成状态
    this.realtimeService.broadcastAgentStatus({
      name: agent.name,
      status: 'success',
      currentTask: `${phase} 已完成`
    })
  }
}
```

```typescript
function handleMessage(message: any) {
  const { event, data } = message
  
  switch (event) {
    case 'iteration.status_changed':
      useIterationStore().updateIteration(data)
      break
    case 'iteration.progress':
      useIterationStore().updateProgress(data.id, data.progress)
      break
    case 'agent.status_changed':
      useAgentStore().updateAgent(data)
      break
    case 'system.metrics':
      useOverviewStore().updateMetrics(data)
      break
    case 'log.entry':
      useLogStore().addLogEntry(data)
      break
  }
}
```
